functions.name: local-zipfile-lambda
functions.notes: Original Lambda code needs to be converted to TypeScript/Bun

functions.name: s3-zipfile-lambda
functions.notes: Original Lambda code needs to be converted to TypeScript/Bun

easy_wins: API Gateway functionality built into Railway Functions - no separate config needed
Custom domains supported natively by Railway
limitations: No direct Route53 equivalent - DNS must be configured manually
Less granular API Gateway features compared to AWS
manual_steps: Convert Lambda code to TypeScript/Bun format
Configure custom domain in Railway UI
Update DNS records to point to Railway-provided domain
Migrate any environment variables from Lambda

lambda_analysis.reason: Both Lambdas appear to be HTTP-triggered functions that can be migrated to Railway Functions. Size needs to be verified but assuming < 96KB based on typical API handlers.
